title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A PRIMARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY CABUAN IN THE CITY OF NAGA, PROVINCE OF CEBU TO BE KNOWN AS CABUAN PRIMARY SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 1596; 109 OG No. 27, 4709 (July 8, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10460, April 16, 2013 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A PRIMARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY CABUAN IN THE CITY OF NAGA, PROVINCE OF CEBU TO BE KNOWN AS CABUAN PRIMARY SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Establishment of a Primary School.

â There is hereby established, under the supervision of the Department of Education, a primary school in Barangay Cabuan in the City of Naga, Province of Cebu to be known as Cabuan Primary School.

SEC. 2.

Appropriations.

â The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Departmentâs program the operationalization of the Cabuan Primary School, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3.

Implementation.

â The Secretary of Education shall issue rules and regulations that may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 4.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on October 15, 2012 and January 28, 2013, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: APR 16 2013

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
